<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of phpunit/php-code-coverage. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage\Test\TestStatus; /** * @immutable */ abstract class TestStatus { public static function unknown(): self { return new Unknown; } public static function success(): self { return new Success; } public static function failure(): self { return new Failure; } /** * @phpstan-assert-if-true Known $this */ public function isKnown(): bool { return false; } /** * @phpstan-assert-if-true Unknown $this */ public function isUnknown(): bool { return false; } /** * @phpstan-assert-if-true Success $this */ public function isSuccess(): bool { return false; } /** * @phpstan-assert-if-true Failure $this */ public function isFailure(): bool { return false; } abstract public function asString(): string; }
